eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 10:21 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 2:21 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued Level 2 BE SET to evacuate for zone JAC-026 18000 block E Evans Creek Rd due to East Evans Creek rd Fire. Continue to monitor local government channels for evacuation and incident updates
